verbatim_quote: Perception, memory, which is like the hippocampus in the mammalian brain. The world model, which is probably in the prefrontal cortex in humans, all kinds of cost functions, some of which are really intrinsic costs that were hardwired into us by evolution, but many of them are costs that we define ourselves.
